title: Warm to hot weather forecast for Christmas
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather forecast from the South African Weather Service, it seems that the Southern Cape region is going to have a warm to hot Christmas day.

Extremely hot and uncomfortable conditions are expected over the West Coast - Cape Winelands, central Karoo and Little Karoo districts on Wednesday. Day time temperatures are expected to reach the high 30s and / or low 40s.


> Impact based warnings for today, Tuesday


A yellow level 1 warning for damaging coastal winds resulting in difficulty in navigation at sea is expected between Cape Columbine and Hermanus from Tuesday afternoon into Wednesday morning.

Advisory

Extremely hot and uncomfortable conditions are expected over the Bergrivier (W. Cape) and Kamiesberg (N. Cape) municipalities on Tuesday, and over the West Coast, Cape Winelands, Central and Little Karoo districts (W. Cape) including Kamiesberg municipality (N. Cape) on Wednesday.


> Expected temperatures on Tuesday


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
